zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Freston於1529年出生在英國英格蘭艾可可拉維林時，她的父親Sir Richard Freston16歲，母親Anne Coke15歲。她於1543年與John Thake在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1568年在她的家鄉享年39歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭艾可可拉維林。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes Freston于1529年出生在英国英格兰艾可可拉維林时，她的父亲Sir Richard Freston16岁，母亲Anne Coke15岁。她于1543年与John Thake在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1568年在她的家乡享年39岁，埋葬在英国英格兰艾可可拉維林。

nameMeanings.name: Freston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Freestone
meanings: English: habitational name from Friston or Freston (both Suffolk), Frieston (Lincolnshire), or possibly Friston (Sussex).

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Freston was born in 1529, in Clavering, Essex, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Richard Freston, was 16 and her mother, Anne Coke, was 15. She married John Thake in 1543, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1568, in her hometown, at the age of 39, and was buried in Clavering, Essex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes Freston est née en 1529, à Clavering, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Richard Freston, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Anne Coke, avait 15 ans. Elle a épousé John Thake en 1543, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1568, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 39 ans, et a été enterrée à Clavering, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes Freston 1529 in Clavering, Essex, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Richard Freston 16 und ihre Mutter Anne Coke 15. Sie hat 1543 in England, United Kingdom John Thake geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1568 im Alter von 39 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Clavering, Essex, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Freston è nata il nel 1529 nel Clavering, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Richard Freston, aveva 16 anni e sua madre, Anne Coke, aveva 15 anni. Lei sposato John Thake nel 1543, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1568, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 39 anni, e fu sepolta a Clavering, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Frestonが1529年にイギリスイギリスエセックスクラバーイングで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Frestonは16歳，母Anne Cokeは15歳であった。1543年にイギリスイギリスでJohn Thakeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1568年に故郷で39歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスエセックスクラバーイングにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Freston(이)가 1529년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 클레이버링에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Richard Freston(은)는 16세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anne Coke(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 1543년 영국 잉글랜드에서 John Thake(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1568년 그녀의 고향에서 39세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 클레이버링에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Freston nasceu em 1529, em Clavering, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Richard Freston, tinha 16 anos e sua mãe, Anne Coke, tinha 15 anos. Ela casou-se com John Thake em 1543, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1568, em sua cidade natal, com 39 anos, e foi sepultada em Clavering, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Freston родилась в 1529 г. в местности клавиринг, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Richard Freston было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne Coke, 15. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Thake в 1543 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1568 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 39 лет и была похоронена в местности клавиринг, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes Freston nació en 1529, en Clavering, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Richard Freston, tenía 16 años y su mamá, Anne Coke, tenía 15 años. Se casó con John Thake en 1543, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1568, en su pueblo, a la edad de 39 años, y fue sepultada en Clavering, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
